mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_result (id, user_id, disease, inspector, job, base_score, created_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{disease}, #{inspector}, #{job}, #{baseScore}, #{createdAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_result SET base_score = #{baseScore} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM analysis_result_chat WHERE result_id = #{resultId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_result_chat (result_id, sender_type, chat_content) VALUES (#{resultId}, 'AI', #{chat_content})

INSERT INTO analysis_result_check (result_id, label, purpose, method, reason) VALUES
(#{resultId}, #{item.label}, #{item.purpose}, #{item.method}, #{item.reason})
